title: pelargonium × laxum
intro: Pelargonium × laxum, also known as Rosy Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, commonly used for its medicinal and culinary properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds, which have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rosy Geranium include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, while also possessing antimicrobial and antifungal properties that can aid in wound healing and skin health. Rosy Geranium is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and support overall well-being.
